calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Authorizing Establishment Of A Special Needs Trust With Property Of The Principal
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Bruce Feder appearing for petitioner. Court questioned the source of the funds and proper venue. Issues addressed by counsel. The beneficiary has waived bond and accounting. Court is approving the petition based on the beneficiary's waiver. Order signed as modified.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Arlene Howell CSR# 2542. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Thompson.
